description_en: In the local text witness, the pseudo-fawasil list for سورة آل عمران is serialized as paired phrasing and ends with an open parenthesis after “متاع قليل”, rather than as nine neatly separated items.
impact_en: The nine-item extraction is reliable, but it requires editorial normalization of the paired phrasing instead of blind line splitting.

description_en: The local text witness contains an unnumbered standalone head (ذو انتقام) and one compressed double head at “٩١ - مما تحبون به عليم”.
impact_en: The ruʾūs list is still recoverable as a full sequence, but these local lines must be normalized explicitly.

description_en: The numeral 140 breaks across the page boundary as “١٤ - ٠”, with the head “الكافرين” appearing alone at the top of the next page.
impact_en: The head can be restored confidently from sequence, but the break must be recorded as an editorial repair.

description_en: The printed witness mixes carried numerals, plain head lines, and end-of-page totals. Those display numerals are not reconstructed here as an independent numbering layer.
impact_en: The dataset preserves the ordered later-Madani head sequence (1–200) rather than a second field for the printed display numerals.
